headline: Assessing Atmos Energy (ATO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Atmos Energy (ATO) has attracted fresh attention after recent share price gains, with the stock showing positive returns over the past month, past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. The Dallas based utility distributes natural gas to about 3.4 million customers across eight states and operates pipeline and storage assets, reporting revenue of US$4.9b and net income of US$1.2b from its US operations. See our latest analysis for Atmos...
